name: Centella Asiatica
description: A medicinal herb known as 'Cica', famous for its rapid skin-soothing properties.
scientificSummary: Contains compounds like madecassoside that significantly lower inflammation and stimulate collagen synthesis in wounds.
mechanismOfAction: Contains compounds like madecassoside that significantly lower inflammation and stimulate collagen synthesis in wounds.
